_comment: Placeholder ComfyUI workflow for InfiniteTalk (audio-driven talking head). Export your InfiniteTalk/MultiTalk workflow from ComfyUI in API format and replace this file. Update input_mappings in config/infinitetalk.json so node ids match: image (LoadImage), audio (LoadAudio), prompt, width/height, and the video output node. The client uploads the scene image + the scene's TTS mp3, then reads the first video output from /history.

inputs.text: a person talking, accurate lip sync
